sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108205" key="u(pogrammatei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπογραμμᾰτ-εία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n108205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the office of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπογραμματεύς,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.840f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
